title: Update cni config instructions
body:
Update the CNI configuration instructions to line up with
the changes introduced in #3868.  Also do a bit less documentation
of the configuration and point to the GitHub project so we won't
get out of sync in the future.

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
All happy green test buttons.  Can this be merged or are there more changes needed?
FYI @jberkus This PR changes the install.md file for Podman, in case you need to adjust for the podman.io work.
